Name: Colonia C.L.U.B.
Notes: Top notes are Bergamot, Lemon, Black Pepper and Pink Pepper; middle notes are Shiso and Rosemary; base notes are Musk and Cedar

Name: Aqua Oud (AdG DNA)
Notes: Top Notes: Sea Notes, Bergamot Heart Notes:  Rosemary, Sage, Geranium, Anise Base Notes: Incense, Patchouli, Ambroxan, White Musk, Vetiver, Moss

Name: Bin Shaikh
Notes: Top notes are Saffron, Rose, oak moss, Lavender and Citruses; middle notes are Bakhoor, Sugar, Jasmine, Orchid and Violet; base notes are Agarwood (Oud), Amber, Patchouli, White Musk and Ambroxan

Name: Ighraa (Dior Sauvage Elixir)
Comment: Ighraa was released before Sauvage Elixir so one could argue that the Dior is the dupe. Regardless, this is better than the several batches of the Dior that I have tried.
Notes: Top notes are Black Pepper, Cardamom, Tobacco, Nutmeg, Cinnamon, Pineapple and Grapefruit; middle notes are Lavender, Patchouli, Iris and Coffee; base notes are Sandalwood, Labdanum, Haitian Vetiver, Benzoin, Vanilla and Amber.

Name: Amber Oud Aqua Dubai (LV Imagination)
Notes: Top notes are Bergamot, Green Notes and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Melon, Amber, Black Currant and Pineapple; base notes are Musk, Petitgrain, Galbanum and Vanilla

Name: L'Aventure Knight (Creed GIT)
Notes: Top notes are Lemon Verbena, Bergamot and Tea; middle notes are Violet Leaf and Iris; base notes are Powdery Notes, Ambergris, Musk and Sandalwood

Name: Centro
Notes: Top note is Bergamot; middle note is Lavender; base note is Cedarwood

Name: Sultani
Notes: Top notes are Cardamom, Pink Pepper, Bergamot, Red Berries and Tangerine; middle notes are Freesia, Damask Rose and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are White Musk, Amber, Sandalwood and Patchouli

Name: Club De Nuit Intense Man Limited Edition (Creed Aventus)
Notes: Top notes are Pineapple, Lemon, Bergamot, Lime, Black Pepper and Pink Pepper; middle notes are Jasmine, Rose, Lily-of-the-Valley and Freesia; base notes are White Musk, Leather, Ambroxan, Cedar, Ambergris and Patchouli

Name: Club De Nuit Sillage (Creed GIT)

Name: Legesi Homme (Chanel Egoiste Platinum)

Name: Morocco (Au Coeur du Désert Tauer Perfumes)
Bentley Intense
Notes: Top notes are Black Pepper, Bay Leaf and Bergamot; middle notes are Rum, Woody Notes, Cinnamon, Clary Sage and African Geranium; base notes are Incense, Leather, Benzoin, Cedar and Patchouli

Name: Film Noir
Notes: Spanish lavender, neroli, tomar seed, rose, allspice, orris, honey, vanilla absolute, patchouli, Buddhawood, vetiver, oud, choya loban, tonka, civet - oakmoss

Name: Racer-X
Notes: lemon, bergamot, mandarin, bitter orange, rose geranium, rosewood, clary sage, cardamom, mace, dark fruits, salty sea air, teak, frankincense, balm of Gilead, mimosa, vetiver, cedar moss, patchouli, muguet, and musk

Name: The Boy
Notes: lemon iced tea, guava, passion fruit, hyssop, lavender, iris, rose, cedar, tobacco, vetiver, treemoss and some primal musk

Name: Viking (F001745)
Notes: Head: Bergamot, Lemon, Orange, Peppermint, Pink Peppercorn, Absinthe Heart: Allspice, Clove, Jasmine, Lavender, Orris Butter, Bulgarian Rose Base: Cedarwood, Tonka Bean, Vetiver, White Musk

Name: Zino
Notes: Top notes are Brazilian Rosewood, Lavender, Clary Sage and Bergamot; middle notes are Rose, Geranium, Jasmine and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla and Cedar

Name: Sauvage EDP
Notes: Top note is Bergamot; middle notes are Sichuan Pepper, Lavender, Star Anise and Nutmeg; base notes are Ambroxan and Vanilla

Name: The One Intense

Name: Gary's Den
Notes: Top notes are Lavender and Bergamot; middle notes are Iris, Labdanum, Cardamom and Coriander; base notes are Musk, Cedarwood, Amber, Vanilla, Patchouli and Vetiver.

Name: Date
Notes: Top notes are juniper berry, Mandarin Orange, Bergamot and Lemon; middle notes are Cardamom and Patchouli; base notes are Vetiver and Agarwood (Oud)

Name: Office
Notes: Top notes are Ambroxan, Bergamot and Orris Root; middle notes are Woody Notes, Floral Notes, Ambergris, Amber and Jasmine; base notes are Woody Notes, Musk, Patchouli and Cashalox

Name: Moonlit Night (D&G The One Luminous Night)
Moonstone Bleu(Pentigans Sartorial)
Notes: Top notes are Aldehydes, Metallic notes, Watery Notes, Violet Leaf, Black Pepper and Cardamom; middle notes are Lavender, Beeswax, Lime, Leather and Cyclamen; base notes are White Musk, Honey, Oakmoss, Woody Notes, Patchouli, Cedar, Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Amber, Gurjan balsam and Myrrh

Name: Code Absolu
Comment: I am not sure why they discontinued this flanker. It outshines the others by far and has excellent performance to back it up.

Name: Gentleman EDP

Name: Héritage EDP
Comment: This is the discontinued wooden cap version. Its a rich and creamy barbershop

Name: Heritage EDT
Comment: This is the discontinued wooden cap version. It has a little less creamy and more spicy patchouli
Notes: Top notes are Lavender, Aldehydes, Juniper Berries, Clary Sage, Bergamot, Lemon, Violet, Green Notes and Petitgrain; middle notes are Patchouli, Coriander, Geranium, Pepper, Rose, Carnation, Balsam Fir, Pink Pepper, Orris Root, Jasmine, Cyclamen and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are Sandalwood, Amber, Oakmoss, Cedar and Musk

Name: Bone Daddy
Notes: bergamot, lavender and ginger mixed with cardamom, sandalwood, rosewood, ivy, oakwood and neroli

Name: Terre D'Hermes EDT
Notes: Top notes are Orange and Grapefruit; middle notes are Pepper, Pelargonium and Flint; base notes are Vetiver, Cedar, Patchouli and Benzoin

Name: Duc de Vervins L'Extreme
Comment: By far, my best performing fougere. It is a classic barbershop fragrance.

Name: Oceanic Noir

Name: Blue Wood
Comment: Many people say that this was inspired by PDM Layton. I find it similar, but better!
Notes: Top notes are Lavender, Black Pepper, Bergamot, Pink Grapefruit, Bitter Orange and Cypress; middle notes are Geranium, Lilac, Jasmine and Violet; base notes are Vanillin, Patchouli, Guaiac Wood and Sandalwood

Name: Mystery for Him
Comment: Created by the Aventus Perfumer. Excellent balance of all of the ingredients. Outstanding performance!

Name: Amber Elixir (CC Amber Elixir)
Notes: Top notes: Bitter orange, cardamom, pink pepper, rum.Middle notes: White tobacco, dried fruit accord, orris.Base notes: Vanilla, tonka bean, cedar, patchouli, musk.

Name: Imaginary (LV Imagination)
Notes: Top notes: citron, calabrian bergamont, sicilian orangeMiddle notes: Nigerian ginger, tunisian neroli, ceylon cinnamonBase notes: Chinese black tea, ambroxan, olibanum, guaiac wood.

Name: Irish Verbena (Creed GIT)

Name: La Nuit 2011 (YSL La Nuit)

Name: L'Homme EDT (PUIG)
Notes: Top notes are Neroli, Black Pepper, Cardamom and Carrot Seeds; middle notes are Iris, Violet, Geranium and Mate; base notes are Amber, Cedar, Sandalwood and Patchouli.

Name: L'Homme Intense (PUIG (April 9, 2019) )
Notes: Top note is Iris; middle notes are Amber and Patchouli; base notes are Tonka Bean, Leather and Sandalwood.

Name: L'Homme L'eau (PUIG)
Comment: PUIG produced the best versions of the fragrance, and this by far outshines the Made in France batches in both performance and scent. This is a must try if you are in to powdery fragrances.
Notes: Top notes are Neroli and Ginger; middle notes are Iris and Amber; base notes are Powdery Notes, Sandalwood and Cedar

Name: Luna Rossa Carbon (PUIG)
Notes: Top notes are Bergamot and Pepper; middle notes are Lavender, Metallic notes, Watery Notes, Coal and Soil Tincture; base notes are Ambroxan and Patchouli.

Name: Safari for Men Cosmair 18E601
Comment: Cosmair produced the best versions of the fragrance and this is no exception. This is a creamy barbershop fragrance with average performance.
Notes: Top notes are Lavender, Bergamot, Aldehydes, Coriander, Green Notes, Artemisia, Lemon and Neroli; middle notes are Tarragon, Carnation, Cinnamon, Rose, Jasmine and Cyclamen; base notes are Leather, Oakmoss, Sandalwood, Musk, Cedar, Patchouli and Amber

Name: Open EDT
Notes: Top notes are Lavender, Amalfi Lemon and Bergamot; middle notes are Thyme and Sage; base notes are Tobacco, Vetiver and Patchouli

Name: Danger PC
Comment: I have many fougeres and this is one of my favorites.

Name: Aqua Odyssey (Creed Aventus)
